sourceRows.Title: The Continuum Limit of Causal Fermion Systems
sourceRows.Summary: Monograph source for causal action, continuum limit, standard-model interactions, bosonic masses and couplings as regularization-dependent quantities.
sourceRows.PromotionBoundary: Strong geometric/variational source lead, but it leaves regularization parameters empirical and Higgs dynamics incomplete.

sourceRows.Title: CFS Standard Model and General Relativity overview
sourceRows.Summary: Official CFS page summarizing Standard Model plus gravity results, massive left-handed bosonic potentials, and scalar degrees identifiable with the Higgs field.
sourceRows.PromotionBoundary: States that the corresponding Higgs field equations have not yet been worked out.

sourceRows.Title: CFS research page on Standard Model and beyond
sourceRows.Summary: Official research page recording that gauge fields of the Standard Model have been derived but the Higgs particle remains the missing piece.
sourceRows.PromotionBoundary: Classifies the Higgs description as future work, not current prediction evidence.

sourceRows.Title: CFS future perspectives: description of the Higgs particle
sourceRows.Summary: Official future-project note saying Higgs scalar degrees are known in multi-sector models but their dynamics has not been worked out and the lower light-cone continuum-limit analysis has not started.
sourceRows.PromotionBoundary: Directly blocks Higgs source-lineage promotion and confirms the work is not complete.

decision: Do not promote W/Z or Higgs physical masses from causal fermion systems in this repository. The route is a serious geometric variational Standard Model lead, but current primary sources leave Higgs dynamics unworked out, treat bosonic masses and couplings as functions of unknown regularization parameters, require fermion mass/vacuum/sector inputs, and supply no GU-local W/Z source rows, observed photon/W/Z/H projection, physical pole extraction, target-independent scale, Higgs scalar-source/self-coupling lineage, or GeV normalization.
nextRequiredArtifact: A GU-local map from Shiab/observer-sector geometry to a causal-action or operator-spacetime structure before using this route as more than an analogy.
A target-independent regularization law deriving W/Z masses, weak mixing, coupling normalization, and GeV scale without fitting empirical regularization parameters.
A completed Higgs dynamics calculation one order lower on the light cone, including scalar source/operator, self-coupling or excitation relation, and stability sidecars.
Observed photon/W/Z/H extraction and complex-pole or equivalent physical mass projection before any promotion.
